proven.claim: Proven: "--ci" is documented in help (line 556) and consumed by
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 556
; Proven: "--ci" is documented in help (line 556) and consumed by
; args.includes("--ci") in runVerify, which controls the exit-code behavior.
(declare-const ci_documented Int)
(declare-const ci_consumed Int)
(assert (= ci_documented 1))
; const ci = args.includes("--ci"); if (ci && report.violations > 0) process.exit(1)
(assert (= ci_consumed 1))
(assert (not (= ci_documented ci_consumed)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — --ci is documented and controls process exit code
